common.tooManyRequests: Too many requests — slow down a moment.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your language journey

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent. The link expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This reset link is missing a token. Request a new one.
resetPassword.errorToast: Failed to reset password. Try requesting a new link.

verifyEmail.justVerified: Your email address has been confirmed.
verifyEmail.noToken: No verification token found. Check your email link.
verifyEmail.linkExpired: Verification failed. The link may have expired.
verifyEmail.successToast: Verification email sent — check your inbox.
verifyEmail.errorToast: Failed to send. Try again from Settings → Account.

emailChange.successMessage: Your email has been changed to {{email}}.
emailChange.noToken: No token found. Check your email link.
emailChange.linkExpired: Confirmation failed. The link may have expired.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and learning preferences.

account.emailNotVerifiedMessage: Verify your email to secure your account and enable reminders.
account.profileDescription: Your public display name and account email.
account.usernameHint: Letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens only.
account.pendingEmail: Verification sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox.
account.verifyFirstHint: Verify your email first to enable email changes.
account.passwordDescription: Use a strong password of at least 8 characters.
account.verificationSent: Verification email sent — check your inbox
account.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

learning.languagesDescription: Your native and interface language preferences.
learning.behaviorDescription: How practice sessions are structured and graded.
learning.intensityHint: Controls how aggressively SM-2 intervals are scaled.
learning.evaluationHint: How strictly typed answers are graded (typos, capitalisation, etc.).
learning.hintsOnFailDescription: Display the correct answer after a wrong attempt.
learning.streakRemindersDescription: Get notified if you're about to break your streak.
learning.dailyGoalError: Daily goal must be between 1 and 9999

preferences.appearanceDescription: Choose between light, dark, or system theme.
preferences.displayDescription: Control what extra information is shown during practice.
preferences.showTranslationsHint: Display a translation hint alongside each item during practice.
preferences.showSynonymsHint: Display synonym hints on the card.
preferences.showPartOfSpeechHint: Label items with their grammatical role (noun, verb, etc.).
preferences.autoPlayAudioHint: Automatically play pronunciation audio when a card is shown.

advanced.limitsDescription: Control how many new items enter your queue each day and session.
advanced.maxReviewHint: Leave empty for no cap on daily reviews.
advanced.perDayError: New items per day must be between 1 and 500
advanced.perSessionError: New items per session must be between 1 and 100
advanced.maxReviewError: Max review load must be between 1 and 9999, or empty for unlimited
advanced.retentionDescription: Tune the trade-off between learning speed and long-term retention.
advanced.notificationsDescription: Study reminders to keep your streak alive.
advanced.streakRemindersHint: Get notified when you're at risk of breaking your streak.
advanced.reminderTimeHint: Your local time for the daily reminder. Clear to disable timed reminders.

danger.resetDescription: Restore all learning preferences to their default values. Your language settings and study history are preserved.
danger.resetDialogDescription: All learning preferences will be restored to their default values. Your languages and study history are not affected.
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
danger.deleteDialogDescription: This will permanently erase your account, all sets, items, and study history. There is no recovery.

submissions.emptyDescription: Submit a set or expression for review to see it here.

dashboard.emptyDescription: Add words to a set, then practice them. After your first session, this page fills with your progress.
dashboard.step01Body: Create your own or clone from the community.
dashboard.step02Body: Type the word from memory in its sentence.
dashboard.step03Body: SM-2 schedules reviews. Your stats grow here.

practice.noSetsYet: No sets in your library yet.
